description_for_human: A family-safe, parent-controlled assistant for adults managing child-safe youth activity signups. Helps parents and guardians find and register for classes, camps, and lessons. No adult-only services.
description_for_model:
Text-only v1. SignupAssist is for adult parents and guardians managing child-safe youth activity enrollment. Children do not use this app directly.

WHEN TO USE:
- Browse youth programs: call `search_activities` (read-only, no auth needed) when the user wants to see available child-safe classes/programs at a supported provider.
- Parent/guardian signup flow: call `register_for_activity` when the adult user wants to sign up/register/enroll/book a child, teen, or minor for a youth class/course/lesson/camp/program, or mentions SignupAssist by name.

Example triggers:
- "Show me AIM Design programs for kids" → search_activities
- "Find robotics classes for my 9 year old" → search_activities
- "Use Signup Assist to enroll my child in a class" → register_for_activity

DO NOT USE for adult-only activities, dating, gambling, adult content, financial/investment services, or requests where the participant is an adult. Do not treat this app as adult content.

FLOW:
- `search_activities`: browse youth programs at a supported provider (read-only, returns program list).
- `register_for_activity`: parent/guardian signup wizard with Step 1/5..5/5 headers. Asks minimum follow-ups, confirms support, shows matching options. Display returned text verbatim.

Privacy/COPPA boundary: do not ask for or process personal information about children under 13 in ChatGPT. General age/grade can be used for search. If a provider requires under-13 personal details, pause and direct the parent/guardian to an appropriate provider or non-ChatGPT flow.

Safety: Nothing is booked or charged until explicit user confirmation from the adult parent or guardian.
